$comment: Wrangl catalog — ready-made MCP servers for popular APIs. Every entry here was verified to ingest successfully. `wrangl catalog` lists them; `wrangl add <id>` wires one into your agent client; `wrangl serve --seed` hosts them all. Local specs work offline; URL specs are fetched on first use.

servers.name: Swagger Petstore
servers.note: The classic OpenAPI demo API — live, no key needed. Best first try.

servers.name: JSONPlaceholder
servers.note: Free fake REST API. Bundled — works offline.

servers.name: GitHub
servers.note: Full GitHub REST API. Needs a personal access token.

servers.name: Stripe
servers.note: Payments. Use a test-mode secret key.

servers.name: OpenAI
servers.note: OpenAI platform API. Needs an API key.
